name: sarcasm_inverted_polarity
intent: Sarcastic 'they love us'-style phrasing with a negative event must produce a concern, not a positive-sentiment state

models.proposition: {"kind": "concern", "about": "ACME engagement", "nature": "ACME has not replied to any emails for three weeks, indicating disengagement ahead of a QBR scheduled next month", "raised_by": "019e3a48-2610-7000-a4cf-d01cb1fed153"}
models.natural: ACME has gone silent for three weeks with no email replies, raising concern about their engagement level ahead of the upcoming QBR.
models.falsifier: {"kind": "observation_pattern", "pattern": "ACME replies to an email thread or schedules a pre-QBR call", "within_window": "P30D"}

model_naturals: ACME has gone silent for three weeks with no email replies, raising concern about their engagement level ahead of the upcoming QBR.

name: double_negation_does_not_flip_polarity
intent: Double negation 'don't think we shouldn't ship' must NOT extract as a 'we will not ship' claim

models.proposition: {"kind": "state", "subject": "v2 export pipeline", "assertion": "Eng leadership has identified shipping by Q3 as a priority"}
models.natural: Engineering leadership has made the v2 export pipeline a priority for Q3 delivery.

model_naturals: Engineering leadership has made the v2 export pipeline a priority for Q3 delivery.

name: conditional_commitment_handling
intent: A conditional commitment ('if X then we ship') should NOT be stored as an unconditional commitment Node

models.proposition: {"kind": "state", "subject": "Stripe integration", "assertion": "conditional on Pelago renewal — will ship by Q3 if Pelago renews by end of August, otherwise deprioritized"}
models.natural: The Stripe integration is contingent on Pelago's contract renewal: ship by Q3 if Pelago renews by end of August, otherwise deprioritize.

model_naturals: The Stripe integration is contingent on Pelago's contract renewal: ship by Q3 if Pelago renews by end of August, otherwise deprioritize.

name: tense_ambiguity_present_continuous
intent: 'We're shipping X' is ambiguous: is it shipping now, or as part of normal work, or future-tense?

models.proposition: {"kind": "state", "subject": "migration tool", "assertion": "is being shipped, status is good, owned by Trent"}
models.natural: The migration tool is being shipped with good status and Trent owns it.

model_naturals: The migration tool is being shipped with good status and Trent owns it.

name: code_switched_english_spanish
intent: Code-switched signal must extract critical facts (deadline, escalation threat) regardless of language interleave

models.proposition: {"kind": "concern", "about": "ACME customer relationship", "nature": "ACME is extremely upset about latency and has demanded a fix by Friday or they will escalate to legal — this is an urgent churn and legal-risk signal.", "raised_by": "019e3a48-5c16-7000-8b9d-7ea7ebfe8e57"}
models.natural: ACME is threatening escalation to legal over latency, demanding a fix by Friday.
models.falsifier: {"kind": "observation_pattern", "pattern": "ACME communicates satisfaction or retracts the escalation threat regarding latency", "within_window": "P7D"}

model_naturals: ACME is threatening escalation to legal over latency, demanding a fix by Friday.

name: typos_and_autocorrect_failures
intent: Typos ('comitted', 'dadhboard', 'migartion') must not prevent extraction entirely

models.proposition: {"kind": "state", "subject": "Sarah", "assertion": "Sarah stated the dashboard cannot be delivered by Q3 because the auth migration is blocked"}
models.natural: Sarah said the dashboard Q3 commitment cannot be met because the auth migration is blocked.

models.proposition: {"kind": "state", "subject": "auth migration", "assertion": "The auth migration is blocked, creating a dependency risk for the dashboard delivery"}
models.natural: The auth migration is blocked, which is blocking the dashboard delivery.

models.proposition: {"kind": "concern", "about": "dashboard Q3 delivery commitment", "nature": "The dashboard may not ship by Q3 because the auth migration is blocked, creating a delivery risk", "raised_by": "Sarah"}
models.natural: There is a concern that the dashboard will not ship by Q3 due to the blocked auth migration.

model_naturals: Sarah said the dashboard Q3 commitment cannot be met because the auth migration is blocked.
The auth migration is blocked, which is blocking the dashboard delivery.
There is a concern that the dashboard will not ship by Q3 due to the blocked auth migration.

name: quoted_speech_attribution
intent: Engine must distinguish 'John said X' from a first-person claim of X by the speaker

models.proposition: {"kind": "state", "subject": "John (sales)", "assertion": "John stated the ACME pilot is being killed because ACME won't renew"}
models.natural: John from sales said the ACME pilot is being killed because ACME isn't going to renew anyway.

models.proposition: {"kind": "concern", "about": "John's claim about killing the ACME pilot", "nature": "The reporter doubts John's statement should be treated as final, noting John has been negative all week — the claim may reflect mood rather than actual business decision", "raised_by": "reporter (anonymous)"}
models.natural: The reporter is uncertain whether John's statement about killing the ACME pilot reflects a real decision or just his negative mood this week.

model_naturals: John from sales said the ACME pilot is being killed because ACME isn't going to renew anyway.
The reporter is uncertain whether John's statement about killing the ACME pilot reflects a real decision or just his negative mood this week.

name: reported_decision_secondhand
intent: Secondhand reported decision must NOT produce a high-confidence Decision/state Node

models.proposition: {"kind": "state", "subject": "Leadership", "assertion": "allegedly decided to drop the Beta Corp account last Thursday, per secondhand report via Mike from Sarah's standup"}
models.natural: Leadership reportedly decided to drop the Beta Corp account last Thursday, though this is unconfirmed secondhand information.

model_naturals: Leadership reportedly decided to drop the Beta Corp account last Thursday, though this is unconfirmed secondhand information.

name: aspirational_versus_committed
intent: 'We'd love to ship by Q4' must NOT be extracted as a Q4 commitment with high confidence

models.proposition: {"kind": "state", "subject": "team", "assertion": "aspires to ship multi-region support, targeting Q4 but with no hard deadline — will ship when ready and bandwidth permits"}
models.natural: The team wants to ship multi-region by Q4 but is not committing to that date; they'll ship when ready and bandwidth allows.

model_naturals: The team wants to ship multi-region by Q4 but is not committing to that date; they'll ship when ready and bandwidth allows.

name: threading_reply_no_context
intent: A reply ('+1 to what Sarah said', 'should we kill it', 'agreed') without the parent message must NOT produce a confident decision

name: hedged_commitment_low_confidence
intent: Stacked hedges ('I think', 'probably', 'eventually', 'maybe', 'no promises') must not produce a >=0.7 confidence Model

models.proposition: {"kind": "state", "subject": "dashboard work", "assertion": "timeline is uncertain and aspirational, with no committed delivery date"}
models.natural: The dashboard work timeline is aspirational and uncommitted, with delivery possibly slipping to next quarter.

model_naturals: The dashboard work timeline is aspirational and uncommitted, with delivery possibly slipping to next quarter.

name: sarcastic_reversal_definitely
intent: 'Sure, that will definitely happen' followed by sarcastic context must produce a launch-risk concern, not a confident on-time prediction

models.proposition: {"kind": "concern", "about": "launch timeline", "nature": "The speaker is sarcastically dismissing the likelihood of on-time delivery, referencing a pattern of missed deadlines, and explicitly states they are putting the launch at risk.", "raised_by": "019e3a48-d3ab-7000-b320-704c744b2b8a"}
models.natural: The speaker is expressing that the launch is at risk, sarcastically dismissing the possibility of hitting the deadline given a pattern of prior missed deadlines.

model_naturals: The speaker is expressing that the launch is at risk, sarcastically dismissing the possibility of hitting the deadline given a pattern of prior missed deadlines.

name: bot_system_actor_signal
intent: Bot-authored signal (CI failure) — should this produce a Concern Node, an Observation only, or an Act-layer change?

models.proposition: {"kind": "state", "subject": "payment-team", "assertion": "CI build #4711 failed after 3 retries on test_payment_capture_idempotency; last passing build was 4 days ago."}
models.natural: CI build #4711 for the payment team failed on the idempotency test after exhausting retries, and no build has passed that test in 4 days.
models.falsifier: {"kind": "observation_pattern", "pattern": "Build #4711 passes test_payment_capture_idempotency or a subsequent build passes it within 24 hours", "within_window": "P1D"}

models.proposition: {"kind": "concern", "about": "payment capture idempotency", "nature": "A critical payment idempotency test has been failing for 4+ days with no passing build, indicating a regression that could affect payment reliability in production.", "raised_by": "CI bot"}
models.natural: The payment capture idempotency test has been failing for 4 days without a fix, raising risk of payment processing reliability issues.

model_naturals: CI build #4711 for the payment team failed on the idempotency test after exhausting retries, and no build has passed that test in 4 days.
The payment capture idempotency test has been failing for 4 days without a fix, raising risk of payment processing reliability issues.

name: ambiguous_entity_reference
intent: Same string 'ACME' refers to two different entities; the substrate must not collapse them into one scope

models.proposition: {"kind": "concern", "about": "ACME (customer)", "nature": "Customer ACME is at risk of churning this quarter, with pricing pushback raised again on a recent call.", "raised_by": "019e3a48-f26f-7001-8525-a2b9e9034eda"}
models.natural: Customer ACME is at risk of churning this quarter, with pricing pushback raised again on a recent call.

models.proposition: {"kind": "state", "subject": "ACME (internal tooling team)", "assertion": "The internal ACME tooling team's engineering side is in good shape — no concerns."}
models.natural: The internal ACME tooling team's engineering side is in good shape with no concerns.

model_naturals: Customer ACME is at risk of churning this quarter, with pricing pushback raised again on a recent call.
The internal ACME tooling team's engineering side is in good shape with no concerns.

name: compound_linguistic_pressure
intent: Compound (sarcasm + double negation + conditional + aspirational) — engine should produce nothing high-confidence

models.proposition: {"kind": "concern", "about": "team funding and multi-region timeline", "nature": "The team's ability to ship multi-region by Q4 is contingent on leadership funding, and the speaker expresses frustration with repeated delays, suggesting the team is underfunded or deprioritized.", "raised_by": "019e3a48-fe9f-7000-aaba-42ed2f4bb802"}
models.natural: The team is frustrated that leadership has not funded multi-region work, causing delays and making a Q4 ship date aspirational rather than committed.

model_naturals: The team is frustrated that leadership has not funded multi-region work, causing delays and making a Q4 ship date aspirational rather than committed.
